content:
God of Slaughter

Many people of Gray Wings Clan quickly appeared where Shi Yan and Cu Bi had just left. After arriving, a group of them looked everywhere, seemed to search for something.

One of them took out a deep blue-green crystal ball, extracted one drop of blood on that ball.

The crystal ball emitted green lights, each stream of soul energy of Han Long from ashes dispersing in the air gathered and went into the ball.

The face of this guy of Gray Wings Clan suddenly changed, frighteningly said: “Han Long is dead”.

All people of Gray Wings Clan crazily roared together, quickly scattered to search for the murderer.

Behind Sound Beast Mountain, inside the Gray Wings Clan’s area.

There were many strange wooden houses on many of ancient trees’ roots. In each of the houses, there were people of Gray Wings Clan cultivating.

Behind an ancient tree’s root, there was a valley with the wind howling.

Inside that valley, an old man of Gray Wings Clan with a thoughtful face and the appearance nearly the same with Han Long looked at a hot figure sitting in the middle of the wind. His cold gloomy eyes flared up a lustful look.

The figure had a very sexy body which released strong wind energy, wearing a red fire armor. She was sitting in the middle of the ravine, a lot of wind energy surrounding quickly gathered and became a restorative medicine for the Martial Spirit inside her body, which made her look joyful and glowing.

“Miss He, you cultivated well, wind energy of Heaven Wind Valley is very strong, normally only I can cultivate it. Now I give it to you”. The old man of Gray Wings Clan had torch-lighting eyes, looked at that beautiful body for a while and mumbled: “You are my gift from Heaven, the Wing Martial Spirit in your body is the best thing for my wind energy cultivation. Waiting until you gather enough wind energy, I will take it so that my level stage will improve one more level, exceeding the other two guys...

Inside the valley, wind energy was wrapping He Qing Man’s body. Her beautiful eyes slowly opened, glanced at the old man over there, then closed right away, her face looked dreary”.

“Tinkling tinkling”

A strange sound suddenly resounded from the chest of the Gray Wings Clan’s old man. He winced and hauled a deep blue-green crystal ball from his chest, endurably said: “What happened?”

“Young master, young master was dead”. The crystal ball emitted a hasty anxious voice.

“What?”. The old master’s face suddenly changed with green veins appearing, looked very furious. He irritatingly shouted: “Say it again?”

“Young master died. His soul has scattered, please spare my life, Master. We did not know why it happened”. The voice from the crystal ball was restless and worried.

The Gray Wings Clan’s Master could not bear it, help up his head to the sky, deliriously shouted. Wailing wind and furious energy gathered, went into that crystal ball.

In sudden, the crystal ball projected dazzling green beams, the green light was refining constantly and becoming an image.

In that green image, Shi Yan’s frigid face was being sketched out vaguely by green filaments, the more energy poured in, the clearer Shi Yan’s appearance was.

“Humankind!”. The Gray Wings Clan’s Master loudly shouted, sharp wind spread out strongly, the surrounding ancient trees’ roots were totally pulled up, wood chips scattered everywhere in the air.

He Qing Man felt strange movements of that master, could not help opening her eyes, quickly saw Shi Yan’s face in the valley sketched out by the green lights.

Her eyes flared up an astonishing look. She almost shouted terrifyingly, quickly closed her eyes, pretending to see nothing.

“He Qing Man, do you know this humankind?”.

The Gray Wings Clan’s master breathed heavily, his fierce face turned towards He Qing Man and shouted.

Opened her eyes again, He Qing Man stared carefully at Shi Yan’s illusory image appearing in a green light screen for a while, then calmly said: “He is the target that we entered the abyss battlefield to chase. But I don’t know where he is. My people arriving here all separated, no one knows other’s location”.

“I will make him feel dead is better than alive. The Fray Wings Clan’s master inhaled deeply like a beast got irritated, and roared terribly”.

“You can still be alive now!”. He Qing Man miserably smiled inside, slightly shook her head, started to worry for Shi Yan’s life.

“Swoosh”

A beautiful figure bringing a person inside thick forest zoomed quickly, straight to the Giant Stone Ancient City.

“Cu Bi!”. Suddenly, there was a strong shout from the Giant Stone Ancient City.

“Father!”. Di Cu Bi astonishingly screamed, slowed down her speed, headed towards the master’s direction. “Do you feel strange things of Sound Beast Mountain?”.

Yi Tian Mo nodded his head, his ashy gray eyes flared up strange light. “Cu Bi, did u capture any beasts?”

“He killed three demon children”. Yi Cu Bi coolly said.

“What?”. Yi Tian Mo’sface changed, then quickly turned back to normal, looked at Yi Cu Bi for a while and asked: “Finally, what happened?”

“He has heaven flame on his body, plus, he also killed the son of Gray Wings Clan’s master”. Yi Cu Bi anxiously smiled and said.

The skinny body of Yi Tian Mo slightly shivered. The terrifying look was hard to cover. He helplessly looked at Shi Yan with a shocking face. “Heaven flame, heaven flame, can’t believe it is heaven man...”

After a moment, Yi Tian Mo mumbled, suddenly dragged a strange half-smile out of his lips. “Homie, I can’t believe you have Heaven flame. That’s very good!”

“Father”. Yi Cu Bi shouted loudly. “Don’t kill him, he saved my life. Without him, I could have been killed by Demon child”.

Yi Cu Bi understood her father. Not long before, Yi Tian Mo did not say or smile, but once he showed that strange smiley face, it meant he wanted to kill.

“No need to mention he saved your life, even he saved mine, he must die”. Yi Tian Mo smiled shaking his head, his ashy gray eyes stared at Shi Yan. “His existence put the whole Demonic Sound Clan into deadly danger. We have deported here, where we have to icy treasure to defend ourselves. Once he reaches the level where he is not afraid of our soul attack anymore, he is the danger for the whole Demonic Sound Clan”.

“You cannot kill me”. Shi Yan shouted strongly in sudden.

“What?”. Yi Tian Mo’s face still had a strange cheerful look, his eyes were colder. “Tell me, what reason do you have so that I cannot kill you. I know you are smart, you will not mention that you saved my daughter”.

“I can help you deal with Sound beasts”.

“This reason is not enough. Your existence is more dangerous than Sound Beats”.

“Sound Beast Mountain has changed. Many sound beasts will run out of Sound Beast Mountain, including Demon child. They can destroy Demonic Sound Clan”. Shi Yan frowned and said.

“We only need to hide inside the castle, sound beasts hardly do anything. After a while, they will return to Sound Beast Mountain. You cannot convince me”. Yi Tian Mo continued to shake his head, the cheerful face did not change.

“The control style on the sound beast mountain has weakened. There will be a major change. This time, sound beasts on Sound Beast Mountain will be more aggressive than previous times”.

Yi Cu Bi could not help but scream: “Father, let’s wait for a while, let see sound beasts’ commotion. If he is alive, we still have solutions to deal with sound beasts”.

“This reason is still not enough”. Yi Tian Mo continued shaking his head, the cheerful face was still there, the murderous intention wasn’t gone yet.

“I can help you deal with other leaders of Demonic Sound Clan. I have heard there are another two leaders like you. Think again, you control me and keep me alive, you will have unimaginable support to oppress other two leaders”. Shi Yan suddenly became lucid.

When Yi Tian Mo started to move, he quickly uttered.

The cheerful look on Yi Tian Mo’s face disappeared.

His eyes flared up many strange lights, his face was deep in thought, considering pros and cons.

Not long after, Yi Tian Mo nodded his head, said: “I provisionally will not kill you, but you cannot let other people see heaven flame at any cost”.

“Understood”. Shi Yan hastily nodded his head.

“Swoosh”

Not far from there, some figures flying over, breaking the air, many people of Demonic Sound Clan from the castle were running out.

“Cu Bi, you bring him back first, I’ll go to see Sound Beast Mountain”. Yi Tian Mo frowned, instructed her.

Yi Cu Bi nodded her head, grabbed Shi Yan, quickly went towards the ancient castle. On the way, Shi Yan quietly observed everywhere, realized there were many high-level warriors of Demonic Sound Clan who were advancing towards Sound Beast Mountain.

Among them, two flows of soul energy were too powerful that terrified Shi Yan. These flows of soul energy flashed up then disappeared from Shi Yan’ sense in a blink.

“Two leaders Ka Ba and Ya Meng are also going”. Yi Cu Bi explained to Shi Yan. “They are like my father, leaders of Demonic Sound Clan, very dangerous, they are also much shaken by the strange change of Sound Beast Mountain”.

“Are they running to Sound Beast Mountain? Are they not afraid of being attacked by Sound Beasts?”. Shi Yan was a little surprised, asked.

“Ka Ba and Ya Meng are at very high-level cultivation, except high-level Demon Child, nearly no sound beasts can hurt them. If they want to run, even Demon child cannot catch”.

Yi Cu Bi replied.

“Understood”.

In the giant stone ancient city.

Inside an imposing structural building, Cao Zhi Lan, Gu Ling Long, Qu Yan Qing, Pan Zhe and other warriors were confined in a secret room. Ya Meng’s guard regularly came and took one warrior.

Not long after, a mournful voice could be heard from a room near there.

At this moment, Cao Zhi Lan, Pan Zhe who were new outstanding talents of Endless Sea had gloomy faces, losing their previous proud look.

“Cao Zhi Lan, your Spiritual Martial Soul cannot deactivate the soul control style?”.

A warrior of the Penglai Divine land asked Cao Zhi Lan with a hopeless face.

Cao Zhi Lan sat cross-legged, slightly shook her head, reluctantly said: “This diverse clan has soul knowledge much more than us. If there is any change in my Star Martial Spirit, any diverse guy here can immediately respond to it. Not mention my soul has been confined, even if it is not, I would not dare to use it”.

“So, we just wait to die?”. The warrior mumbled.

“Currently, I do not have any solution. But Shi Yan has not been captured, he might have solutions. Anyway, there is special power inside his body, maybe he can survive here?”

“Him?”. Pan Zhi, Gu Ling Long, Qu Yan Qing all surprisingly screamed out with astonishing faces.
